from cadquery import Workplane

# Ring dimensions (size 7 US)
ring_inner_diameter = 17.3  # mm
ring_outer_diameter = 19.3  # mm
ring_height = 2.0  # mm
band_width = 2.5  # mm

# Diamond settings
diamond_length = 8.0  # mm (oval length)
diamond_width = 6.0  # mm (oval width)
diamond_height = 5.0  # mm (total height)
prong_diameter = 0.8  # mm
prong_height = 4.0  # mm

# Create the main ring band
result = (Workplane("XY")
    .cylinder(ring_height, ring_outer_diameter/2)
    .faces(">Z or <Z")
   ...
